snippet: In 2017, the Department implemented the online Performance and Development Plan (PDP) system. The system includes: All school staff complete their PDPs using the Department's online system, unless a school has an existing contractual arrangement in place. The Department will only use performance and development data at the aggregate not at the school level and as such, data contained in an individual employee’s PDP will not be used beyond the school. Support and resources to assist with the use of the online PDP can be accessed at Online PDP Support and Resources External Link .
